title: The Blood Reconciles Heaven and Earth
summary: “And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to reconcile all things unto himself; by him, I say, whether they be things in earth, or things in heaven.” (Colossians 1:20). The apostle Paul tells the Colossian church that the Lord Jesus reconciled heaven and earth through his blood. This is a profound statement that needs careful unpacking. How did the Lord reconcile heaven and earth through the agency of his blood? Put differently, how did the blood of the Lord both connect and heal the rift or gap between heaven and earth? Perhaps a good analogy to help us begin to understand this wonderful saving truth is the circulation of blood in our own bodies.
